# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
function user_file_upload() {
    if (isset($_FILES['file'])) {
        $allowed_types = array('image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'application/pdf', 'application/msword');
        $max_size = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB

        if ($_FILES['file']['size'] > $max_size) {
            echo "File size exceeds the limit.";
            return;
        }

        if (!in_array($_FILES['file']['type'], $allowed_types)) {
            echo "Invalid file type. Only images, PDFs and Word documents are allowed.";
            return;
        }

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $upload_path = $upload_dir['path'] . '/user-files/';
        if (!wp_mkdir_p($upload_path)) {
            echo "Failed to create upload directory.";
            return;
        }

        $filename = $_FILES['file']['name'];
        $file_extension = pathinfo($filename, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
        $new_filename = wp_unique_filename($upload_path, $filename);

        if (!wp_mkdir_p($upload_path)) {
            echo "Failed to create upload directory.";
            return;
        }

        $move_result = move_uploaded_file($_FILES['file']['tmp_name'], $upload_path . '/' . $new_filename);
        if (!$move_result) {
            echo "Failed to upload file.";
            return;
        }

        // Update user meta with uploaded file path
        update_user_meta(get_current_user_id(), 'profile_picture', $new_filename);

        echo "File uploaded successfully.";
    }
}

add_action('wp_ajax_user_file_upload', 'user_file_upload');
